01. About

Who I Am

I'm a Full Stack MERN Developer based in Ahmedabad, India with 3 years of experience crafting production-grade web applications.

I specialize in building scalable SaaS platforms, real-time systems, and AI-integrated applications. My stack spans React.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and AWS – with a strong focus on performance and clean architecture.

03. Experience

Where I've Worked

Mern Stack Developer @ Way to React Technology Pvt. Ltd.

May 2024 – Present

  • ▸Collaborated with product managers to translate requirements into technical specs for an AI-powered WhatsApp coaching SaaS platform using Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL.
  • ▸Integrated Stripe subscription billing and Twilio messaging workflows for automated payment lifecycle management.
  • ▸Developed a scalable admin dashboard for analytics and conversation tracking with strict coding standards.
  • ▸Implemented Redis caching and Socket.io real-time communication, optimizing speed, scalability, and reduced API latency.

Frontend Developer @ Nextun Technology Pvt. Ltd.

2023 – 2024

  • ▸Developed multiple React-based e-commerce platforms with responsive UI and secure authentication flows.
  • ▸Converted Figma designs into production-ready React and Tailwind CSS components with pixel-accurate consistency.
  • ▸Built dynamic dashboards and reusable frontend modules using Bootstrap and Redux, reducing repeated development effort.

Web Developer @ Freelance

2022 – 2023

  • ▸Worked on E-commerce projects using React Applications.
  • ▸Implemented secure user authentication and account management functionalities.
  • ▸Handled confidential documents and maintained their proper organization.
  • ▸Created websites allowing users to browse products, add items to their carts, and securely complete transactions.

04. Projects

Things I've Built

01

NoXQS AI WhatsApp Coaching Bot

AI-powered WhatsApp coaching platform with multilingual Claude AI personas, Stripe subscription billing, and admin dashboard for real-time analytics, user management, and conversation monitoring.

Node.jsClaude AIPostgreSQLStripeTwilioAWS
02

Infinity Trucks Fleet Management

Real-time GPS tracking platform with live vehicle location updates, InfluxDB telemetry storage, and warehouse task assignment with driver tracking workflows.

Socket.ioRedisMongoDBInfluxDBNode.js
03

Glip Health Management System

Complete clinical onboarding RESTful APIs covering patient registration, treatment settings, and medication logs. Structured relational PostgreSQL schema with proper indexing for clinical data performance.

Node.jsExpress.jsPostgreSQL
04

Bytecoder Digital Learning Platform

Digital learning and competitive exam prep platform featuring a real-time peer-to-peer problem-solving forum. Integrated doubt-posting workflows, gamified user points ledger, and collaborative student learning ecosystems.

React.jsNode.jsExpress.jsMongoDBSocket.io
05

Influencer Collaboration Web

Administrative control center dashboard for venue managers and administrators to efficiently review incoming collaboration requests, assess influencer profiles, and approve proposals, featuring central collaboration workflows and data-driven insights.

React.jsXanoStream Chat API
